case_title: SIENA PACIFIC INC. VS. MURRY WINDOWS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2013 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIENA PACIFIC INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WINDOWS, MURRY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIENA PACIFIC INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,456.00 FILED BY SIENA PACIFIC INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WINDOWS, MURRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIENA PACIFIC INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WINDOWS, MURRY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIENA PACIFIC INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WINDOWS, MURRY $3,456.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,521.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-16-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT FOR TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WILL BE FILING AN AMENDED COMPLAINT TO INCLUDE ANOTHER DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE ALL DEFENDANTS PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL AUSTIN--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CAROL MURRAY--OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL AUSTIN--PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF STATED IN COURT THAT HE WANTED TO PROCEED ON THE ORIGINAL CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
